scripts.start:ml: cd ml-service && source venv/bin/activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --names "ML,BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run start:ml" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../ml-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
